name: Insurance Management
description: Comprehensive insurance management system — manage policies, process claims, track clients, and handle premium payments with coverage analysis and risk assessment.
author: AENEWS

capabilities.name: searchPolicies
capabilities.description: Search for insurance policies by number, type, or client

capabilities.name: createClaim
capabilities.description: File a new insurance claim against a policy

capabilities.name: getClient
capabilities.description: Get client profile with all active policies and claims

capabilities.name: updatePolicy
capabilities.description: Update policy coverage, terms, or status

capabilities.name: deletePolicy
capabilities.description: Cancel or remove an insurance policy

capabilities.name: getClaim
capabilities.description: Get claim details with assessment and payment status

capabilities.name: searchClaims
capabilities.description: Search claims by number, status, or date range

permissions.name: Read
permissions.description: Read insurance data including policies, claims, and clients

permissions.name: Write
permissions.description: Create/Update policies, claims, clients, and payments

permissions.name: Delete
permissions.description: Delete policies, claims, and payment records

permissions.name: Admin
permissions.description: Full insurance administration including coverage rules and risk settings
